page: Vultr vbm-256c-3072gb-8-mi355x-gpu is a bare metal server configured with x86_64 architecture. It features AMD EPYC 9575F processors operating at 3.3 GHz, delivering 128 physical cores and 256 vCPUs with 2.0 threads per core. The system is equipped with 3072.0 GB of system memory, providing 12.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server integrates eight AMD MI355X GPUs from the CDNA4 family, offering a total of 2304 GB of high-bandwidth VRAM. For local storage, the configuration includes 28608 GB of NVMe SSD capacity. It also includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Given the high density of GPU accelerators, massive system memory, and extensive NVMe storage, this bare metal instance offers high resource density for specialized workloads. It is designed for large-scale artificial intelligence tasks, deep learning model training, LLM fine-tuning, high-performance computing, and complex data science simulations requiring massive parallel processing and high-speed local storage.
description: Vultr vbm-256c-3072gb-8-mi355x-gpu is an x86_64 bare metal server designed for high-performance computing and artificial intelligence workloads. It is powered by AMD EPYC 9575F processors running at 3.3 GHz, providing 128 physical cores and 256 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 3072.0 GB of system memory and a local storage array of 28608 GB NVMe SSDs. For acceleration, the server is equipped with eight AMD MI355X GPUs from the CDNA4 architecture, delivering a total of 2304 GB of VRAM. This dense hardware profile is optimized for large-scale machine learning model training, LLM inference, and data-intensive scientific simulations.
